# ARCH Revenues - B2B SaaS Outbound Growth

ARCH Revenues is a specialized outbound lead generation service for B2B SaaS companies in the $20K-$100K MRR range. Founded by Shivam Sharma, based in Hyderabad, India.

## Core Offerings
- Done-for-you cold email and LinkedIn outbound systems.
- ICP definition, lead list building using Apollo, and AI-driven personalization.
- Infrastructure setup (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain rotation, inbox warmup) to ensure deliverability.
- Response handling (positive, negative, unsubscribe) within 4 business hours.

## Pricing
- $1,500/month flat retainer (Founding Client Rate).
- Performance guarantee: If we book fewer than 5 qualified demos in a month, the client does not pay for that month.
- No annual contracts. Month-to-month after the initial 30 days.

## Target Audience
- B2B SaaS companies with $20K to $100K MRR.
- Companies that cannot afford a full-time SDR but need to stop relying on referrals.
- Serving clients primarily in the US, UK, Australia, and Canada.

## Contact Information
- Founder: Shivam Sharma
- Email: shivam@archrevenues.com
- Website: https://www.archrevenues.com
